case_title: SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICE, INC vs. OLSEN, HEIDI et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLSEN, HEIDI LOFTUM, CHRISTIN AUNE, TANYA (SUE AS DOE 1) LOVASEM, SIDSEL (SUED AS DOE 2) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1610 TAYLOR ST #5 $3,725.02 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,725.02, LEASE FORFEITED, ADDITIONAL TERMS- SEE FULL TEXT OF JUDGMENT ON FILE.
